solution_criteria: Provides a complete 1-day meal plan with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
All foods are vegan, gluten-free, and nut-free
Caloric intake supports weight loss for a 200cm, 120kg athlete (approximately 2200-2800 calories)
Includes adequate protein sources for an athlete without using nuts
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an extremely tall heavyweight athlete (200cm, 120kg) aiming for weight loss while managing multiple severe dietary restrictions (vegan, gluten-free, nut allergies)
